## Summary

What this change does and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Editorial fix, no conformance effect (PATCH)
- [ ] Additive or relaxed change (MINOR)
- [ ] Removed field, tightened constraint, or invalidates conforming guides (MAJOR)
- [ ] Tooling or repository change only

## Checklist

- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated for any normative change
- [ ] `spec.md` and `verifier-conformance.md` kept consistent
- [ ] Schemas, examples, and fixtures updated to match
- [ ] `make eval` passes
- [ ] Threat model impact stated for any change to a defense
